---
title: "The Rev. Dr. John Prideaux Lightfoot"
---

## The Rev. Dr. John Prideaux Lightfoot

**Dates:** (1802/3-23 March 1887)

**Maiden name:** D.D.

### Description

Rector of Exeter College Oxford from 1854

### Biography

[<i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>; Oxford University Calendar 1877]

### Letters

- Letter from May 1st 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
